scope: B1 — One-click bounded invoke polish (clear action wording, clear blocked/queued/completed states, better inline confirmations, cleaner operator guidance).
B2 — Better bounded-action affordance design: at the action point the user sees what the action will do, will NOT do, and whether operator approval is required.

env_gate_preserved.enabled_behavior: POST /api/sandbox/enqueue → enqueue a bounded SandboxRequestPacketV1; worker still requires operator to run `harness-tick --queue sandbox_queue` from terminal

b1_invoke_tr_wiring.pattern_before: inline isKo ? '…' : '…' ternary strings (operator-tone, hard to change)
b1_invoke_tr_wiring.pattern_after: tr(locale_key) resolved from phase47e_user_locale SHELL (single source of truth)

server_wiring.note: The server is the single source of truth for which harness-tick command to run; the UI must not reconstruct it client-side.

state_polling.policy: one-time after enqueue (1.5s post-enqueue delay masks common Supabase commit lag) + on explicit operator 'Refresh' click; no background polling
state_polling.rationale: Background polling would erode the operator gate (Product Spec §4.3: operator decides when harness-tick runs; UI must not imply otherwise).

b2_contract_card_at_action_point.position: rendered inside the research section, ABOVE the invoke buttons, so the contract is visible at the action point (not only in logs).

copy_ko.head: 이 액션의 범위
copy_ko.will_do: 수행: 샌드박스 큐에 bounded validation_rerun 요청 1건을 적재합니다.
copy_ko.will_not_do: 수행하지 않음: 활성 레지스트리 변경·아티팩트 승격·Today 화면 갱신은 하지 않습니다.
copy_ko.after_enqueue: 적재 후: 운영자가 터미널에서 `harness-tick --queue sandbox_queue` 를 실행해야 샌드박스 워커가 돌아갑니다.

copy_en.head: What this action does
copy_en.will_do: Will do: enqueue one bounded validation_rerun request into the sandbox queue.
copy_en.will_not_do: Will NOT do: mutate active registry, promote artifacts, or refresh the Today surface.
copy_en.after_enqueue: After enqueue: the operator must run `harness-tick --queue sandbox_queue` in a terminal for the sandbox worker to execute.

operator_gate_smoke_trace: scripts/agh_v1_patch_7_product_hardening_runbook.py::_run_s3_bounded_invoke_contract — FixtureHarnessStore-backed smoke verifies disabled_status=403 with error=operator_gate_disabled, enabled_status=200 with cli_hint and operator_note populated.
